author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Iguanodon was a large herbivore from the Early Cretaceous period, famous for its distinctive conical thumb spikes.
Iguanodon could move on both two and four legs, using its stiff tail for balance while grazing on ferns and horsetails.
